title: ligularia secunda
intro: Ligularia secunda, also known as the Japanese ligularia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ligularia secunda is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
